fundamentals.description: Broadcom Inc., a Delaware corporation headquartered in San Jose, CA, is a global technology leader that designs, develops and supplies a broad range of semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions. Broadcom's category-leading product portfolio serves critical markets including data center, networking, enterprise software, broadband, wireless, storage and industrial. Our solutions include data center networking and storage, enterprise, mainframe and cyber security software focused on automation, monitoring and security, smartphone components, telecoms and factory automation.

news.title: Broadcom’s 2nm AI Chip Launch Tests Valuation And Growth Expectations
news.description:
Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has begun shipping what it describes as the industry's first 2nm custom compute SoC using 3.5D XDSiP stacking technology.
The chip is being rolled out with Fujitsu, targeting power efficient, high performance AI compute for next generation data center clusters.
Early use cases focus on AI and data center workloads where power efficiency and compute density are critical.

For investors watching Broadcom at a current share price of $319.55, this launch adds a fresh...
